Hypothetical Pulse Interventions

pulses.Rd

Create counterfactual perturbations with specific 0/1 intervention and total length patterns.

Usage

pulses(p_states, lags = 1, L = 3, w_star = c(0, 1))

Arguments

lags

The time length of any interventions that we generate.

L

The total length returned, including both intervention and non-intervention timepoints

w_star

The unique values to include in and out of the intervention. Defaults to 1/0, respectively.

p_stats

A list specifying the row names and whether they should include interventions. Any name set to TRUE will include intervention effects, while those with FALSE will not.

Examples

library(mbtransfer)
pulses(c("P1" = TRUE), 1, 4)
#> [[1]]
#>    Tn_1 Tn_2 Tn_3 Tn_4
#> P1    0    0    0    0
#> 
#> [[2]]
#>    Tn_1 Tn_2 Tn_3 Tn_4
#> P1    0    0    0    1
#> 
pulses(c("P1" = TRUE), 1:3, 4)
#> [[1]]
#>    Tn_1 Tn_2 Tn_3 Tn_4
#> P1    0    0    0    0
#> 
#> [[2]]
#>    Tn_1 Tn_2 Tn_3 Tn_4
#> P1    0    0    0    0
#> 
#> [[3]]
#>    Tn_1 Tn_2 Tn_3 Tn_4
#> P1    0    0    0    0
#> 
#> [[4]]
#>    Tn_1 Tn_2 Tn_3 Tn_4
#> P1    0    0    0    1
#> 
#> [[5]]
#>    Tn_1 Tn_2 Tn_3 Tn_4
#> P1    0    0    1    0
#> 
#> [[6]]
#>    Tn_1 Tn_2 Tn_3 Tn_4
#> P1    0    1    0    0
#>
